```js title=main.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
it("should be able to load package without side effects where modules are unused", () => {
	__rspack_require("./module.js");
});


},
"./module.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export),
  test: () => (test)
});
/* import */ var _package__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./package/index.js");


/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (_package__rspack_import_0.a);

function test() {}


},
"./package/index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  a: () => (a)
});


function a() {
	return 42;
}

function b() {
	return value;
}


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
